posts.author: LB2018 (Elizabeth Butler)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I want to direclty link my Monday boards to Power BI for live data. We don’t have an IT team that can help me and I was wondering if someone on this community can. I do have access to API/ developers.

  • Need to directly connect multiple boards at the same time to Power BI
  • Get all the information from each boards
  • History date stamp of when the stage/task changes

Thank you,
Liz

posts.author: ErickE-monday.com (Erick E.)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

We offer some resources that your developers can access to get more information on our API capabilities - have you had a chance to check them out?

Does monday.com have an API?

monday.com API Documentation

These articles could be a good starting point, but I would love to hear other users’ ideas!
